mapper.sql: id, orderid, order_item, params, result, master, dlv_entire, dlv_type, dlv_date, wms_dlv_data, dlv_special, dlv_self, dlv_split, dlv_address

select
distinct
from dbo.ops_order_update_new
order by ${orderByClause}
